description_long: This object consists of two aluminum beverage cans, both visibly crushed and discarded, lying parallel and pressed together. The upper can is predominantly yellow with the word 'DORADA' and wheat graphics, while the lower can is orange-red with the word 'AMBER' and a stylized animal illustration. Both cans display significant surface wrinkling, dents, and deformation, indicating they have been compressed after use. The tops of the cans show standard pull tabs, and the printed labels are partially scuffed but still legible. The cans are empty, with their interiors likely filled with air, and the exterior surfaces are matte with some glossy remnants from the original label finish.
description: Two crushed aluminum beverage cans, one yellow and one orange-red, with visible branding and heavy surface dents, pressed together as street trash.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the tops of both cans with standard pull tabs and visible crushing around the rims.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the side labels, revealing the 'DORADA' and 'AMBER' branding and graphics, as well as the parallel alignment of the cans.
description_view_2: View 2 highlights the rear and side surfaces, showing more of the yellow and orange-red label text and the extent of the crushing.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the bottoms of both cans, with nutritional and recycling information visible and the flattened, dented bases.
attribute_brand_logo: Both cans feature stylized graphics: the yellow can has a wheat motif and the word 'DORADA', while the orange-red can has an animal illustration and the word 'AMBER'.
attribute_label_text: DORADA, AMBER, PALMA, BREWING CO., ALE, 16, 4.5, 20, 49, 22, DORADA, AMBER, PALMA, BREWING CO., DORADA, AMBER, PALMA, BREWING CO.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Both cans are heavily dented and crushed along their bodies and rims, with visible scuffing and label wear, but no rust or corrosion is apparent.
